Latest Release

Dime Que Sí

Spanglish Pop Reggaeton 100 BPM

Dime Que Sí (Tell Me Yes) — mi gente, la noche es nuestra. A neon-lit love letter built for late-night drives, violin hooks, and a chorus made to be screamed with your best friends.

Happy Birthday Mama

Nightlife Diaries
The Artist

Warm vocals. Violin hooks. A sound built for the whole crew, every night out.

Keiro K blends Modern Latin Pop, Melodic Reggaeton and Emotional Latin Trap into one signature sound — energetic violin melodies, deep bass, and hypnotic synths wrapped around Spanglish hooks made to sing along to.

Every song lives in the same world: neon city lights, late-night drives, and the friends who show up when it matters. Romance, freedom, and unforgettable nights — that's the whole story.
